items.subject: Three students flagged this week
items.snippet: Jaylen, Sofia, and Andre are all slipping in math. Jaylen's attendance is the biggest concern. Can we get mentors matched?

items.subject: Mentor availability — Tue/Thu PM
items.snippet: Most open mentor slots are Tuesday and Thursday afternoons on the east campus.
